7. Conclusion

This network pharmacology analysis identified 2 key targets of Curcumin against Rheumatoid Arthritis. Hub gene analysis revealed CD2 and IL2 as the most connected genes. KEGG enrichment identified Allograft rejection as the most significantly enriched pathway (p = 3.796428e-03).
